summary: Completed testing of Stock Dashboard Cascading/Dependent Filters feature. Backend: 11/11 tests pass (100%) for GET /api/stock-dashboard/filter-options endpoint. Frontend: Cascade filtering verified - selecting Marca=BOOSH correctly reduces Tela dropdown to only 'Drill', Entalle to ~6 options. Cross-filter clicks (modelo, talla, color) still work with cascade. 'Limpiar todo' button clears all filters correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stock-dashboard/filter-options returns all filter types (tienda_canonicas, marcas, tipos, entalles, telas, tallas, colores)
Backend: No filters returns full counts (32 entalles, 39 telas, 161 colores)
Backend: filter-options with marca=BOOSH returns reduced entalles (6), telas (1=Drill), tallas (4), colores (20)
Backend: Cascade self-exclusion logic works (entalle options not reduced by entalle filter)
Backend: Multiple filters (marca+tipo) further reduces options correctly
Backend: Cache works - second identical request returns same data
Backend: Tallas are sorted correctly (S < M < L)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with initial filter options
Frontend: Select Marca=BOOSH → filter chip appears, KPIs update
Frontend: Tela dropdown with BOOSH shows only 'Drill' option
Frontend: 'Limpiar todo' button clears all filters and chips
Frontend: Cross-filter by modelo click → 'Modelo: X' chip appears
Frontend: Cross-filter by talla header click → 'Talla: M' chip appears, column highlighted
Frontend: KPIs update correctly with cascaded filters (44,229 → 1,567 with BOOSH)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cascade/dependent filters fully functional. NEW endpoint: GET /api/stock-dashboard/filter-options accepts same params as /panels. Backend has 60s cache (_fopts_cache). Reference values: Unfiltered=32 entalles, 39 telas, 161 colores. With marca=BOOSH: entalles=6, telas=1 (Drill), tallas=4, colores=20. Each filter field excludes itself from cascade calculation (self-exclusion). Frontend auto-cleans invalid filters via setF callback when options arrive. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_cascade_filter_options.py covers all cascade logic with 11 passing tests.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. Cascading filter feature implemented correctly.
